artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE with CLEAR PANEL GRID and white gutters. TOP wide panel: night camp fire, courier Elara Venn shares waybread with a lost child, soft glowing egg nearby, amber firelight, distant cyan rift hairline. BOTTOM two panels: left close-up of Elara speaking kindly; right child holding a small shell fragment as soft light hums. Thick black borders, sequential storytelling. NO floating portrait cards, NO collage creature stickers, NO lore-plate overlays. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, balloons, logos, or UI in the art.

lines.text: She shared waybread with a child who had lost a name.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: Call the creature yours to keep — not yours to own.
CODEX ECHO — Waybread on the First Night
